nsm.note: Appointments jumped from 0/day early March to 4-6/day last week. Strong inflection point — pipeline is activating.

ga4.sessions.note: Sessions down from 86 spike on Mar 20 but stable at 16-36 range

gsc.impressions.note: GSC impressions stable 200-290 range. Position improving.

gsc.position.note: Position improved from 11-13 in mid-March to 7-9 range. Trending up 3+ consecutive days.

meta-ads.clicks.note: Clicks 23% above 30d average — more efficient delivery.

meta-ads.ctr.note: CTR slightly below 30d avg. May indicate audience saturation on current creatives.

meta-ads.cpc.note: CPC dropped 18% vs 30d avg. Best CPC days: Mar 28 (0.48€) and Mar 29 (0.45€). Excellent efficiency.

ghl.newContacts.note: New contacts 23% above 30d avg. Spike on Mar 30 (25 contacts) — investigate source.

ghl.appointments.note: MAJOR inflection: appointments went from 0 (Mar 13-21) to 4-6/day (Mar 22+). This is the NSM moving.

anomalies.note: 25 new contacts = 3.4x the 7d average. Investigate: batch import? Campaign burst? New lead magnet?
Appointments jumped to 6/day — sustained for 4 days. Positive anomaly. Something is working.
CPC has been below 0.71€ for 4 consecutive days (Mar 27-30). 18% below 30d avg. Inverted metric: lower is better.
CTR declining from 4.6% (Mar 13) to 2.0-2.4% range (last 7 days). Below 0.75x peak. Creative fatigue likely.
Engagement rate has been 0% for 5+ consecutive days (Mar 18-19, etc.). Bounce rate at 100% on several days. Website is not engaging visitors.

opportunities.note: Average position improving consistently: 12.95 → 10.39 → 8.69 → 7.05. Several pages approaching page 1. Opportunity to push blog content with internal linking.
CPC at all-time low (0.45-0.48€). Good time to increase budget on winning creatives before fatigue sets in.
Appointment pipeline activated. Opportunity to optimize the lead→meeting conversion further — currently 72.7% which is excellent.

projectCorrelations.impact: CPC improved 18%, clicks up 23%. Campaign 'G4U - Testeo Creativos - Copy' running with multiple ángulos. Winners: Ángulo 4_V3 (CTR 7.4%, CPC 0.70€) and Ángulo 5_V2 (CTR 6.3%, CPC 0.72€).
Appointments started appearing after tracking/fontaneria fixes. Correlation with P01 completion.

recommendations.title: Refresh ad creatives — CTR fatigue detected
recommendations.description: CTR has dropped from 4.6% to ~2.3% over 3 weeks. Rotate in new creatives for Ángulo 2 and Ángulo 3 (worst performers). Keep Ángulo 4_V3 and Ángulo 5_V2 as controls.

recommendations.title: Investigate Mar 30 contact spike (25 contacts)
recommendations.description: 25 new contacts on a single day = 3.4x average. Determine if this was a batch import, a specific campaign burst, or organic. If replicable, double down.

recommendations.title: Fix website engagement — bounce rate at 100%
recommendations.description: Multiple days with 100% bounce rate and 0% engagement rate. Visitors land and leave immediately. Check: page load speed, mobile UX, CTA visibility, content above the fold. This is leaking the traffic Meta Ads is sending.

recommendations.title: Scale Meta Ads budget on winning creatives
recommendations.description: CPC at 0.45-0.48€ on best days. Ángulo 4_V3 and 5_V2 are clear winners. Increase daily budget by 30-50% on these adsets while CPC is favorable.

recommendations.title: Understand appointment activation source
recommendations.description: Appointments went from 0 (Mar 13-21) to 4-6/day (Mar 22+). What changed? New automation? Manual follow-up? Different ad landing? This is the most important signal of the month.

recommendations.title: Push SEO content into top 5
recommendations.description: Average position improved to 7.05. Top pages like 'herramientas-outreach-y-prospeccion-b2b' are at position 6-7. Add internal links from homepage and blog index to push them into click-generating positions (<5).

recommendations.title: Pipeline tracking gap — 0 opportunities despite 44 appointments
recommendations.description: GHL shows 0 opportunities and 0 pipeline value despite 44 appointments this month. Either the pipeline stages aren't being used, or there's a tracking gap. This needs manual review — without it, we can't measure ROI.
